title: Alex moved from SF to Portland
summary: In early 2024 Alex set a goal to move to Portland (where Jordan, family, lives). The move happened 2024-09-15.

title: Alex's employment arc 2022-present
summary: Alex worked at dayjob from March 2022. In April 2024 they decided to quit. Started at otherjob June 2024.

title: Alex's notebook-app side project
summary: Side project started January 2023. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki (consumed April 2024). Target was Q4 2024 launch (slipped to Q2 2025).

title: Alex's laptop decision arc
summary: In February 2024 Alex decided on MacBook Pro. April 2024 revised to Framework Laptop. Reviewed in April 2025 — still happy with the choice.
